payload.label: rug
payload.long_description: Small rectangular teal rug with a darker teal center and a narrow white border; low-pile/flat-weave appearance, partially occluded by two white bowls and lying on a hardwood floor — appears to be a small placemat-sized rug roughly 0.6 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"rug","short_description":"small teal rectangular rug, partial","long_description":"Small rectangular teal rug with a darker teal center and a narrow white border; low-pile/flat-weave appearance, partially occluded by two white bowls and lying on a hardwood floor — appears to be a small placemat-sized rug roughly 0.6 m from the camera.","attributes":["teal/darker-teal center","narrow white border","rectangular shape","small / placemat-sized","low-pile / flat weave","partially occluded by white bowls","on hardwood floor","visible intact edges"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
